title: People Analytics / Employee Experience Consultant
description: Design and execute employee listening strategies using Viva Glint. Transform insights into meaningful actions for organizational performance.
responsibilities: Plan, configure, and implement employee listening programs using Viva Glint
Manage full survey lifecycle (planning, deployment, monitoring, reporting)
Analyze quantitative and qualitative data to identify engagement drivers
Translate insights into strategic recommendations for executive leadership
Act as trusted advisor to senior stakeholders including CHRO-level
Deliver executive presentations focused on business value
Lead change management and organizational enablement initiatives
Apply people analytics frameworks to link employee experience with business outcomes
team_context: LATAM People Analytics expansion. Supporting digital transformation in employee experience. Reporting to Chief People Officer.
